metadata.description: A Claude Code marketplace of skills inspired by Andrej Karpathy's teaching and coding philosophy: minimal, readable, pedagogical code from first principles.

plugins.name: andrej-karpathy-skills
plugins.description: Skills that channel Andrej Karpathy's approach: write minimal, readable, single-file code; teach from first principles; favor clarity over cleverness; build ML/LLM components from scratch.
